title: Virtualization Talos
text:
bootOrder: 1
                  disk:
                    bus: virtio
          volumes:
            - name: talos-cp01-disk-vda-root
              dataVolume:
                name: talos-cp01-root
      dataVolumeTemplates:
        - metadata:
            name: talos-cp01-root
          spec:
            pvc:
              accessModes:
                - ReadWriteOnce
              storageClassName: linstor-igrok
              resources:
                requests:
                  storage: 40G
            source:
              http:
                url: https://github.com/siderolabs/talos/releases/download/v1.12.2/metal-amd64.iso
    ```
